label: Prompt Template
description: Choose a localized template to fill the user prompt.
replaceNotice: Selecting a template replaces the current user prompt text.

codeReview.label: Code review request
codeReview.content:
Review the following code and identify bugs, risks, and improvement points.

```text
{code}
```

summarize.label: Content summary
summarize.content:
Summarize the following content into concise bullet points.

{content}

translate.label: Translation request
translate.content:
Translate the following content into English while preserving the original meaning and tone.

{content}
